mapper.sql: CASE type WHEN 0 THEN 'SYSTEM' WHEN 1 THEN 'TASK' WHEN 2 THEN 'ORDER' WHEN 3 THEN 'REVIEW' ELSE 'REPORT' END
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_message ( receiver_id, type, title, content, is_read ) VALUES ( #{receiverId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{content}, #{read} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_message WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND is_read = false
mapper.update: UPDATE t_message SET is_read = true WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND is_read = false
